text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Classics, the Kikuka Sho,
turns out to be the grounds for a battle between
three Mejiro Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, who excels at long distances, is
determined to win. It will be difficult to pull
ahead victorious against her determination.
